features.title: Adaptive Shared Cooking
features.headline: One Dinner. Two Plates.
features.shortDescription: One cooking session, two different plates. We generate a unified recipe with AI-adapted plating instructions so you both hit your goals.
features.longDescription: When you share a life, you share meals. But traditional meal planning apps treat everyone as an isolated individual. They expect you to either abandon your goals to eat the same thing, or cook completely separate dinners. We solved this. You follow one single cooking workflow together. When the food is ready, the app provides visual, AI-adapted plating guides. It tells you exactly how much chicken to give Partner A, and how much extra rice to give Partner B.
benefits: Automatically optimized for each partner's goals
No more cooking two separate meals

partnerA.name: Partner A
partnerA.plate: Chicken over bed of spinach, ½ cup rice

partnerB.name: Partner B
partnerB.plate: Extra chicken over full cup of rice

features.title: Real-Time Sync
features.headline: Never Buy Milk Twice
features.shortDescription: Never buy milk twice. Our lightning-fast shared grocery list updates instantly for both of you, whether you are at home or in the aisle.
features.longDescription: Our shared grocery list uses lightning-fast real-time sync. Add an item from home and it appears on your partner's phone at the store in under 100ms. Check off an item at the store and it disappears from the shared list instantly. No phone calls, no duplicate purchases, no confusion.
benefits: Works offline — queues sync when reconnected

features.title: Pantry-First AI
features.headline: Your Fridge Just Became a Menu
features.shortDescription: "We have chicken, rice, and spinach..." Tell the app what you have, and our AI suggests perfect meals to reduce waste and save a trip to the store.
features.longDescription: Stop staring into the fridge wondering what to cook. Tell Couples Food System what you have, and our AI generates meal suggestions that use your existing ingredients. Type or dictate naturally: "We have chicken, rice, spinach, and half an onion." The AI understands and creates meals around what you already own. Less waste, fewer trips to the store, more money in your pocket.
benefits: Natural language input — just type what you have
Reduces food waste by using existing ingredients
Saves money on unnecessary grocery trips
AI suggests meals you'd never think of

features.title: Collaborative Planning
features.headline: Your Week, Planned Together
features.shortDescription: A shared kitchen metaphor that ends the "what's for dinner?" argument. Plan your week together with zero mental load.
features.longDescription: Plan your entire week in one tap. Our AI creates a shared meal plan that respects both partners' dietary preferences and goals. Missing ingredients automatically populate your shared grocery list. Both partners see and edit the same plan in real-time. Sunday planning becomes a 5-minute conversation, not an hour-long negotiation.
benefits: AI generates a full week of meals

steps.title: Invite Your Partner
steps.description: Link your accounts to create your shared digital kitchen. "We" replaces "You".

steps.title: Set Your Goals
steps.description: Partner A wants more energy; Partner B wants to build strength. Set your individual preferences behind the scenes.

steps.title: Stock the Pantry
steps.description: Quickly log what you already have. Our AI uses this to suggest smart, waste-free meals.

steps.title: Generate Meals
steps.description: Hit generate. We create a weekly plan with one unified, real-time grocery list.

steps.title: Cook Together
steps.description: Follow one simple recipe, then plate it two ways based on your individual needs. Eat together in peace.
